chapter_title: Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles
text: The court in which the action is pending may order such continuances as may be necessary to afford the defendant reasonable opportunity to defend the action.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 9. CIVIL LIABILITY [17000 - 17714]
### Chapter 1. Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles [17000 - 17463]
#### Article 4. Service of Process [17450 - 17463]
##### § 17457

The court in which the action is pending may order such continuances as may be necessary to afford the defendant reasonable opportunity to defend the action.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The court in which the action is pending may order such continuances as may be necessary to afford the defendant reasonable opportunity to defend the action.
